tasks.title: PATCH /v1/invoices/:id/status functional tests
tasks.description: Functional tests for the existing PATCH /v1/invoices/:id/status route. Tests: 400 invalid status value, 400 invalid status transition (e.g. COMPLETED→PENDING), 404 invoice not found, 200 success PENDING→PROCESSING, 200 sets settledAt on SETTLED, 200 sets completedAt on COMPLETED, 200 response shape (success+data), 500 on DB error. File: backend/src/routes/__tests__/invoice-status.test.ts
tasks._blockedReason: Mass block 2026-03-25: zombie tasks from old sprint running destructively via sprint runner. Review before unblocking.

tasks.title: DELETE /v1/webhooks/:id + functional webhook CRUD tests
tasks.description: Functional tests for POST /v1/webhooks (register), GET /v1/webhooks (list), DELETE /v1/webhooks/:id. Tests: 201 register success, 400 missing url, 200 list webhooks, 200 delete existing, 404 delete non-existent, response shape. File: backend/src/routes/__tests__/webhooks-crud.test.ts

tasks.title: GET /v1/metrics endpoint
tasks.description: Basic metrics endpoint for agent economy insights. Returns: { invoices: { total, byStatus: {PENDING, PROCESSING, SETTLED, COMPLETED} }, settlements: { total, last7Days }, reputation: { agents: N, avgScore } }. File: backend/src/routes/metrics.ts + app.ts registration + 5 tests. Max 80 lines.

tasks.title: Zod schema for PATCH /v1/invoices/:id/status body
tasks.description: Add Zod validator for the status patch body in validators/invoice-schemas.ts. Schema: z.object({ status: z.enum(['PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'SETTLED', 'COMPLETED']) }). Export as updateInvoiceStatusSchema. Tests: valid statuses accepted, invalid status rejected, missing status rejected. File: backend/src/validators/invoice-schemas.ts + validators/__tests__/invoice-status-schema.test.ts
